user.title: Weather sensors
user.description:
Configure Sensor + Unit pairs where applicable:
1) Temperature + unit
2) Wind speed + unit
3) Pressure + unit
Then select humidity, luminosity, and rain sensors.

data.requires_companion: Requires companion zone for full duration

zone_et0.title: ET₀ parameters — {zone_name}
zone_et0.description:
1.0 = reference ET₀. Adjust the factor to match the zone's water demand.
Minimum time: ensures a minimum irrigation run even when the deficit is low (0 = no minimum).

block_add.title: Configure irrigation group

error.entity_not_found: Entity not found. Check if the sensor exists.
error.duplicate_zone_name: A zone with this name already exists.
error.duplicate_zone_switch: This switch is already added as a zone.
error.invalid_companion_pool: Invalid companion pool for dependent zone.
error.companion_must_be_in_same_block: Companion zone must be in the same irrigation group.
error.companion_chain_not_allowed: Companion chain is not allowed (A->B and B->C).
error.block_needs_zone: A block must contain at least one zone.

init.title: Edit integration variables
init.description:
Update Sensor + Unit pairs (temperature, wind, and pressure) and general parameters.
Enable the option below to reconfigure zones and blocks while keeping currently configured items.
